channel.title: Wera Hobhouse MP
channel.description: The Member of Parliament for Bath since 2017

item.title: Make Misogyny a Hate Crime
item.dc:creator: Rory Mcalpine
item.description:
Violence against women and girls is growing, making misogyny a hate crime would be an important step to tackling this. When in opposition, Labour pledged to make misogyny a hate crime. Now they’re in power, they have gone silent and seemingly forgotten this commitment. If preventing violence against women and girls is truly a priority […]

The post Make Misogyny a Hate Crime appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
item.content:encoded:
Violence against women and girls is growing, making misogyny a hate crime would be an important step to tackling this.

When in opposition, Labour pledged to make misogyny a hate crime. Now they’re in power, they have gone silent and seemingly forgotten this commitment. If preventing violence against women and girls is truly a priority for this Government they should remember their past conviction, follow through, and deliver this.

The post Make Misogyny a Hate Crime appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.

item.title: Crack Down on Covert Filming
item.dc:creator: Rory Mcalpine
item.description:
Women are being secretly filmed on nights out – often from low, suggestive angles when they are wearing skirts – with these videos then uploaded online, where they attract large volumes of misogynistic abuse and degrading comments. Videos of this kind have been viewed more than 3 billion times. At present, they fall into a […]

The post Crack Down on Covert Filming appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
item.content:encoded:
Women are being secretly filmed on nights out – often from low, suggestive angles when they are wearing skirts – with these videos then uploaded online, where they attract large volumes of misogynistic abuse and degrading comments.

Videos of this kind have been viewed more than 3 billion times. At present, they fall into a legal grey area between voyeurism and harassment laws, leaving the police with limited powers to act. I am calling on the government to strengthen the law to put an end to this. No woman should find herself plastered over the internet without her consent and subjected to such vile abuse.

The post Crack Down on Covert Filming appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.

item.title: Energy Security Means Investing in Renewables
item.dc:creator: Rory Mcalpine
item.description:
Trump’s war on Iran has sent global oil and gas prices spiralling, hitting already struggling households and businesses hard. It has clearly exposed the absurdity of backing fossil fuels over renewables. Our reliance on oil and gas is risking our energy security. We must change this by investing more in home grown renewable energy. Renewables […]

The post Energy Security Means Investing in Renewables appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
item.content:encoded:
Trump’s war on Iran has sent global oil and gas prices spiralling, hitting already struggling households and businesses hard. It has clearly exposed the absurdity of backing fossil fuels over renewables.

Our reliance on oil and gas is risking our energy security. We must change this by investing more in home grown renewable energy. Renewables do not have to pass through the Strait of Hormuz and are therefore not affected by the global chaos we are seeing currently.

Reform and the Conservatives continue to push anti-renewable policies which will only keep us at the mercy of future global energy crises. To protect our energy security we must back UK renewables and the companies that are finding innovative ways to generate clean energy.

The post Energy Security Means Investing in Renewables appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.

item.title: Stopping Social Media Drug Sales
item.dc:creator: Rory Mcalpine
item.description:
Children are buying vapes laced with the dangerous drug spice through social media platforms. I have been campaigning for tech companies to be held accountable and made to put an end to this online drug dealing. In Parliament, I argued that platforms possess advanced technology that allows them to know our every click, like and […]

The post Stopping Social Media Drug Sales appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
item.content:encoded:
Children are buying vapes laced with the dangerous drug spice through social media platforms.

I have been campaigning for tech companies to be held accountable and made to put an end to this online drug dealing.

In Parliament, I argued that platforms possess advanced technology that allows them to know our every click, like and view on social media. The Government must force companies to use this technology to prevent children buying these illicit vapes and take down the accounts that are selling them.

The post Stopping Social Media Drug Sales appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.

item.title: Challenging China’s Aggression
item.dc:creator: Rory Mcalpine
item.description:
In Parliament I pushed for the government to sanction those responsible for targeting pro- democracy Hong Kong campaigners living in the UK. Hong Kong authorities have issued bounties of HK$1 million (around £100,000) for information leading to the arrest of campaigners who fled to the UK after being accused of breaking Hong Kong’s oppressive national […]

The post Challenging China’s Aggression appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
item.content:encoded:
In Parliament I pushed for the government to sanction those responsible for targeting pro- democracy Hong Kong campaigners living in the UK.

Hong Kong authorities have issued bounties of HK$1 million (around £100,000) for information leading to the arrest of campaigners who fled to the UK after being accused of breaking Hong Kong’s oppressive national security law, introduced by Beijing.

I urged the government to respond to this ‘act of transnational aggression’ by sanctioning those in Beijing and Hong Kong responsible for issuing these rewards. We must show China we won’t tolerate foreign interference.

The post Challenging China’s Aggression appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.

item.title: Preventing Eating Disorder Deaths
item.dc:creator: Rory Mcalpine
item.description:
Far too many lives are being lost to eating disorders. These could, and should have been avoided with better early intervention and proper care. The true scale of this crisis remains hidden with eating disorder related deaths often mis-recorded or omitted and recorded as suicide or organ failure. In parliament I led a debate where […]

The post Preventing Eating Disorder Deaths appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
item.content:encoded:
Far too many lives are being lost to eating disorders. These could, and should have been avoided with better early intervention and proper care.

The true scale of this crisis remains hidden with eating disorder related deaths often mis-recorded or omitted and recorded as suicide or organ failure.

In parliament I led a debate where I pressed for a confidential inquiry into eating disorder-related deaths so we can identify the failures in the current system and learn where, and how, we must deliver the change needed to prevent these lives being lost.

The post Preventing Eating Disorder Deaths appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.

item.title: Bath’s New SEND School
item.dc:creator: Rory Mcalpine
item.description:
In Parliament, I called on the Government to urgently release the frozen funding for Bath’s new special school. Parents of children with special educational needs are crying out for special school places across Bath. Funding to build a brand new special school at the Culverhay site was secured but then frozen by the Government with […]

The post Bath’s New SEND School appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
item.content:encoded:
In Parliament, I called on the Government to urgently release the frozen funding for Bath’s new special school.

Parents of children with special educational needs are crying out for special school places across Bath. Funding to build a brand new special school at the Culverhay site was secured but then frozen by the Government with no explanation for 18 months. I pushed for the Government to release this funding so children can get the education and support they deserve.

Following my intervention, the Government announced they would provide the funding for the school. I will continue pushing for it to be built as quickly as possible.

The post Bath’s New SEND School appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.

item.title: Tackling Online Abuse Against Women
item.dc:creator: Rory Mcalpine
item.description:
Technology and social media  platforms are enabling new avenues to harass and abuse women online. In Parliament I urged action to fight this. New technology and online platforms are increasingly being used to harm, abuse, and harass women. This has most recently been demonstrated through AI-generated sexual abuse images and deepfakes. Too often, we find […]

The post Tackling Online Abuse Against Women appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
item.content:encoded:
Technology and social media  platforms are enabling new avenues to harass and abuse women online. In Parliament I urged action to fight this.

New technology and online platforms are increasingly being used to harm, abuse, and harass women. This has most recently been demonstrated through AI-generated sexual abuse images and deepfakes.

Too often, we find ourselves on the back foot, reacting to new technological abuses only after they have caused harm. By the time legislation addresses one form of technology-facilitated abuse, another has already emerged. Ofcom has failed to take this digital exploitation seriously, which is why I argued that the Government must create a dedicated online crime agency to effectively tackle illegal online content and activity.

The post Tackling Online Abuse Against Women appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.

item.title: Standing Up To Trump
item.dc:creator: Rory Mcalpine
item.description:
I called on the Government to call out Trump’s bullying and threatening behaviour towards the UK and EU over Greenland. Trump’s use of tariff threats to intimidate other countries into handing control of Greenland to the US is wholly unacceptable. Many of my constituents have told me they are willing to accept tariffs if that […]

The post Standing Up To Trump appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
item.content:encoded:
I called on the Government to call out Trump’s bullying and threatening behaviour towards the UK and EU over Greenland.

Trump’s use of tariff threats to intimidate other countries into handing control of Greenland to the US is wholly unacceptable. Many of my constituents have told me they are willing to accept tariffs if that is the cost of standing up to Trump, and they expect their Government to show the same resolve.

I pressed the Government to take a firm stance and make it unmistakably clear the UK will not be bullied.

The post Standing Up To Trump appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.

item.title: Dementia question
item.dc:creator: WP Admin
item.description:
After visiting dementia charity Remind UK I asked in Parliament for a statement from the Health Secretary letting us know when the Modern Service Framework for Dementia and Frailty, which was promised in the NHS 10 year plan, will be published. ReMind is an independent charity getting ahead of dementia with world-class research, early diagnosis, […]

The post Dementia question appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
item.content:encoded:
After visiting dementia charity Remind UK I asked in Parliament for a statement from the Health Secretary letting us know when the Modern Service Framework for Dementia and Frailty, which was promised in the NHS 10 year plan, will be published.

ReMind is an independent charity getting ahead of dementia with world-class research, early diagnosis, support and advice. With their headquarters based in Bath they perform world leading research, offer expert assessment, treatment and diagnosis, information, support and courses for those affected by dementia. 

The Government must deliver this plan to support those affected by dementia and all the people and organisations that care for them.

The post Dementia question appeared first on Wera Hobhouse MP.
